summary.key_theme: Qualcomm 憑藉與 ByteDance 及 Stellantis 的 AI 晶片合作案帶動股價創高，儘管近期面臨獲利了結賣壓與半導體類股波動。

bullish.title: Qualcomm Is Teaming Up With ByteDance. What It Means for QCOM Stock
bullish.reason: Qualcomm 與 TikTok 母公司 ByteDance 達成 AI 資料中心晶片供應協議，此重大合約為公司在 AI 基礎設施領域的擴張提供強勁背書。

bullish.title: Can Qualcomm's Expanded Stellantis Tie-Up Boost Its Shares?
bullish.reason: 擴大與 Stellantis 的合作夥伴關係，將 Snapdragon Digital Chassis 技術導入 AI 聯網車輛，強化了公司在車用晶片市場的領先地位。

bullish.title: Melius Research Raises Qualcomm (QCOM) Price Target, Sees More Upside in AI Semiconductor Stocks
bullish.reason: Melius Research 上調目標價，反映市場對其在 AI 半導體領域長期成長潛力的信心。

bullish.title: What Is Going On With Qualcomm Stock On Thursday? — Qualcomm (QCOM) stock jumps premarket to $205.59
bullish.reason: 受惠於 AI 智慧型手機市場 32% 的成長預期，推動股價在盤前出現顯著漲幅。

bearish.title: What Is Going On With Qualcomm Stock On Wednesday? — Qualcomm (QCOM) stock falls 7% on profit-taking
bearish.reason: 儘管有重大合約利多，但股價在創高後出現獲利了結賣壓，導致單日下跌 7%。

bearish.title: Qualcomm Cofounder's Granddaughter, Now In Congress, Sells Almost $2 Million In QCOM Near Record High
bearish.reason: 國會議員拋售近 200 萬美元持股，雖屬個人財務規劃，但可能引發散戶對股價高點的疑慮。

bearish.title: Why Qualcomm (QCOM) Stock Is Trading Lower Today
bearish.reason: 受整體半導體類股拋售潮影響，導致股價出現 4% 的修正。

bearish.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Valuation In Focus After Semiconductor Selloff And AI Rally Cooldown
bearish.reason: 市場對 AI 類股估值過高的擔憂，導致投資人對 Qualcomm 的評價進行重新審視。

neutral.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated (QCOM) Presents at Bernstein 42nd Annual Strategic Decisions Conference Transcript
neutral.reason: 公司參與投資人會議，主要為例行性業務說明，未釋出重大影響股價的突發消息。

neutral.title: S&P 500 And Nasdaq Close At Record Highs, Dow Climbs Amid Hopes Of Diplomatic Resolution Between US And Iran
neutral.reason: 整體市場情緒受地緣政治緩解影響，Qualcomm 作為成分股隨大盤波動，非公司特定因素。

neutral.title: QUALCOMM Incorporated (QCOM) Is a Trending Stock: Facts to Know Before Betting on It
neutral.reason: 僅為 Zacks.com 的熱門搜尋分析，提供投資人基本面回顧，無實質利多或利空影響。

neutral.title: Is Qualcomm Inc. (QCOM) a Top tech Stock in Ken Fisher Portfolio on Data Center Opportunities?
neutral.reason: 報導知名投資人 Ken Fisher 的持股組合，屬市場觀察性質，對股價無直接驅動作用。
